entities.name: HUMANS
entities.description: Humans who require mineral elements for healthy body function

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: An essential macromineral required in relatively large quantities in the diet for maintaining sound overall health

entities.name: CALCIUM MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition of calcium deficiency affecting young children, pregnant and nursing women, and the elderly

entities.name: OSTEOPOROSIS
entities.description: A bone condition resulting from calcium deficiency in the elderly population

entities.name: OSTEOPENIA
entities.description: A bone condition resulting from calcium deficiency in the elderly population

entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: Eleusine coracana (L.) Gaertn., a crop with inherently higher calcium content in its grain

entities.name: CALCIUM CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of calcium present in the grain of crops

entities.name: PLANT-BREEDING
entities.description: A method used to increase calcium contents in staple crops

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: A method of increasing the nutritional value of crops, also known as plant-breeding

entities.name: BIOAVAILABILITY
entities.description: The form of calcium that can be adequately absorbed by the body to impact malnutrition

entities.name: STAPLE CROPS
entities.description: Crops consumed on a daily basis
